implement.detail: panel becomes a PLATFORM-SERVED lazy runtime asset (C3 pattern; IIFE app bundles rule out esbuild splitting): panel+player+css moved to api/assets/panel-runtime/src (git mv), compiled by build.mjs (own React, css-injected, prod+minified, workspace nodePaths) to the gitignored assets/panel-runtime.js at api build (chained: tsc -b && node build.mjs), served at /__ekoa/panel-runtime.js; scaffold mount.js is a React-free plain-DOM launcher (5273B measured, 8192B budgeted) loading on first click or 2s-floored idle; open intent = window flag (pre-mount) + 'ekoa:assistant-open' CustomEvent (post-mount) + onerror resets guard AND flag; Dockerfile ships assets from the build stage. Panel fixes now reach every served app without rebuilds. Worker-delegated; briefs + impl-notes in slices/G2/

test.detail: panel-lazy.test.ts structural suite (source-left-scaffold, React-free + byte budget, offline real-esbuild compile, self-mount + egress-clean asset, open-intent event pins, onerror-resets-guard-and-flag pin, BOTH route availability branches via real servingRouter with injected path incl. the 404-not-200 invariant); tour-player suites moved with the files; D2 assistant-panel suite repointed + pins the lazy split; full lane independently re-run by the lead: 170 files, 1489 passed / 1 pre-existing skip; tsc both configs, eslint, chokepoint grep, stale-ref grep all clean; deploy/validate-topology.sh OK after the Dockerfile change

securityWall.detail: gitleaks clean on all 4 commits; chokepoint grep clean; compiled asset unit-asserted egress-clean (no provider token); script src is a fixed same-origin constant (no attacker input); no innerHTML with dynamic content in the launcher (static SVG+label only); NO permission logic (H-block rule intact, can() still stubbed)

liveVerification.detail: G2 LIVE GATE: PASS (run 2, app ecd8826e on the rebuilt+restarted stack): A launcher visible immediately with ZERO panel-runtime fetch (no React parsed on first paint); B click -> exactly ONE fetch -> panel opened; C full 6-step tour played to 'concluído' after the lazy mount (E2 regression guard); D zero POST /api/app-assistant + no idle double-load; E zero non-benign console errors. Run 1 FAILED and caught a REAL race (click lost between idle inject and boot-launcher removal) -> the open-intent event fix (911f00b) + driver arm-before-click; the later codex fixes (3254e23) are error-path-only (404 fallback + flag clear), unreachable on a healthy stack, unit-asserted instead. Builds burned: 2 (the authorized 1+1). Evidence: live-output.txt + evidence-live.cast + live-01/02 screenshots (casts/screenshots local, repo-ignored)

freshReview.detail: VERDICT: APPROVE incl. the 911f00b follow-up section (slices/G2/review-verdict.md): no High/Medium; 3 Lows ALL closed - Low-1 onerror retry (fed1255, then hardened by codex M1's 404 in 3254e23), Low-2 build-artifact deploy fragility (runbook note + louder boot warning + the lead found it CONCRETE: Dockerfile.api copied assets from the host context where the artifact is absent in CI/stale on dev - fixed to copy from the build stage, fed1255), Low-3 driver idle-race flake (converged with the live-gate catch, fixed 911f00b). Reviewer explicitly re-reviewed 911f00b: fix correct, closes a race its own first pass under-called

codexSliceReview.detail: gpt-5.5/high read-only (quota returned 2026-07-13 ~16:55 local): NEEDS-WORK with 2 Medium + 1 Low, ALL fixed in 3254e23 - (M1) 200-comment fallback defeats onerror (script 'loads', guard latches, dead launcher): missing artifact now 404s (loud AND recoverable; deliberate divergence from the eager siblings, documented in-route); (M2) stale __ekoaAssistantAutoOpen after a failed click makes a later idle preload mount OPEN: onerror clears the flag; (Low) fallback path untested: both availability branches now unit-asserted through the real servingRouter with an injected asset path

designAudit.detail: launcher is pixel-consistent with the panel's own (same class, CSS-var contract with fallbacks, same ChatIcon SVG + PT-PT 'Assistente' + aria-label); live screenshots live-01/02 show launcher-only first paint and the opened panel; no emoji, no em/en-dash in authored copy

walkthrough.detail: evidence-live.cast (asciinema of the green run 2) + live-output.txt (committed) + live-01-launcher-no-fetch.png / live-02-panel-open.png
